name: Medaillons of Pork Tenderloin Veronique
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Pork Tenderloin (cut into 3 ounce portions)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Pork Tenderloin into 3-ounce portions, season with salt and white pepper, and sauté in butter until browned. Remove from the pan and keep hot.
2. In the same pan, add more butter and sauté chopped shallots for two minutes. Add veal stock and sherry wine, bringing to a boil. Scrape the bottom of the pan to dissolve all drippings from the tenderloins, then reduce the sauce by half its volume.
3. Add heavy cream, stir well, and bring to a boil. Strain the sauce into another clean pan and return the tenderloins to the sauce. If needed, thicken with cornstarch.
4. Sauté seedless grapes in butter. Place two 3-ounce fillets on a dinner plate, arrange four to five grapes on top, and pour about 2 ounces of sauce over each fillet. Garnish with parsley.
